title: Theology
content:
There is a heaven, for ever, day by day,
    The upward longing of my soul doth tell me so.
    There is a hell, I 'm quite as sure; for pray,
    If there were not, where would my neighbours go?
meaning:
Paul Laurence Dunbar's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "Theology"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
